CustomField.formula: IF( INCLUDES(ProgramArea__c, "Child Care") , "Child Care, ", "") + IF( INCLUDES(ProgramArea__c, "Dairy") , "Dairy, ", "") + IF( INCLUDES(ProgramArea__c, "Drinking Water") , "Drinking Water, ", "") + IF( INCLUDES(ProgramArea__c, "Food") , "Food, ", "") + IF( INCLUDES(ProgramArea__c, "Industrial Camps") , "Industrial Camps, ", "") + IF( INCLUDES(ProgramArea__c, "Personal Services") , "Personal Services, ", "") + IF( INCLUDES(ProgramArea__c, "Recreational Water") , "Recreational Water, ", "") + IF( INCLUDES(ProgramArea__c, "Residential Care") , "Residential Care, ", "") + IF( INCLUDES(ProgramArea__c, "Sewerage") , "Sewerage, ", "") + IF( INCLUDES(ProgramArea__c, "Tobacco and Vapour") , "Tobacco and Vapour, ", "")
CustomField.label: Selected Program Areas
